description.en: Play the Cursebound if you want to draw additional power from your Oracular Font-weal or woe.
After you use your Oracular Font feature, until your next rest, all rolls with Hope have advantage, and all rolls with Fear have disadvantage.
henever you roll with Fear, you can **mark 2 Stress** to instead Fail with Hope.
Whenever an adversary succeeds on an attack roll against you, you can cast your curse upon them, making them temporarily Vulnerable.
After using your Oracular Font feature, add a Vision token to this card. Whenever you Fail with Hope, you can remove a Vision token to instead succeed with Hopе.
Play the Martyr if you want to make vital sacrifices to gain powerful boons.
When you would mark a Hit Point, you can instead **spend 3 Hopе.**
Whenever the GM would gain a Fear, you can **mark 2 Hit Points** instead.

Whenever you would mark Stress from a Recall Cost, you can choose to either:

- instead gain that much Hope and cause the GM to gain that much Fear.

- instead mark that many Hit Points.

You can choose a domain card from your loadout and choose to either:

- Place the card in your vault permanently to Critically Succeed on your next action or reaction Roll.

- Place it in your vault to gain advantage on your next action or reaction Roll.
